content:
# Shrinkage Expansion

**Summary**: The change in volume of cement due to chemical reactions or temperature changes.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2012-amer|Amer, 2012]] evaluated the shrinkage/expansion of cement samples over 168 hours.

## Scientific Context

- [[2012-amer|Amer, 2012]] Ensures the cement fills all voids and prevents gas migration.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2012-amer|Amer, 2012]] Measured as radial expansion over a 7-day period.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- All cement samples exhibited expansion after 7 days, indicating Nano silica did not cause shrinkage. ([[2012-amer|Amer, 2012, p. 124]])
